productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Brasilia 4 Navy Blue Duffle Bag
description: Composition            Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better duffel bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great weekend bag.Height:11.5"Width: 12"Depth: 25.4"Capacity: 58 LMade of nylon and polyester with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaningBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously compartment that has a zippered pouch on the inside and contoured zipper closurePockets on either side, one of which has a mesh panelSwoosh logo on the front and the side of the pocketSynthetic haul loops for handling ease that comes with a velcro rollAdjustable synthetic padded shoulder straps  Wash CareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
